svg.title: sequence diagram
svg.desc: A sequence diagram with 8 nodes and 10 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: User, pureflow-cli, workflow-format.. Key relationships: User points to pureflow-cli with label: run workflow; pureflow-cli points to workflow-format with label: parse document; workflow-format points to workflow graph with label: build validated graph.. Layout spans 2301 by 1446 units with 8 rendered node boxes and 10 routed edge paths.
